name: Aerial Lockdown
short_description: Aerial Lockdown, an Arcade game where you'll navigate your airplane over a factory-filled city. Destroy them! Blow them to pieces! But avoid the mines in the sky. Now fly my friend, and make Davie Bones proud!
detailed_description:
What

Take control over your own Biplane and clear the airspace of this distopian city. During this make sure to destroy the factories below, spewing out aerial mines. Avoid these at all costs and (you'll might) keep your head.

Points?

Earn points by dropping, fiendly, unharmful, nuclear looking bombs onto the factories to destroy them. But not only demolishemnt of factories earns you points. Destroing:

  • Factories

  • Houses

  • Mines

all gives you points, to increase your score. You may also be critical, if you use their own weapons against them, if you know what i mean (Missiles)

Mines

The factories release deadly mines that will end you if too close. They will detonate if you gat to close with a force that deal a ton of damage. You must keep the under controll by destroing them, or you must fight in the shade.
